questions.question: A logistics company has $5$ delivery trucks with the following travel times (in hours) to a warehouse: $2$, $3$, $4$, $5$, $6$. What is the $\median$ travel time?
A shipping company has the following package delivery times (in minutes): $10$, $12$, $15$, $18$, $20$. What is the $\mode$ delivery time?
The average speed of $7$ cars on the highway is $60$ miles per hour. If one more car with a speed of $70$ miles per hour is added, what is the new average speed?
A traffic flow study records the following number of cars passing through an intersection per hour: $50$, $60$, $70$, $50$, $60$. What is the $\mean$ number of cars per hour?
The times (in minutes) for $9$ flights to arrive at an airport are: $20$, $25$, $30$, $20$, $25$, $30$, $20$, $25$, $35$. What is the $\mode$ arrival time?
The average weight (in pounds) of $8$ packages is $40$. If two more packages with weights $30$ and $50$ pounds are added, what is the new average weight?
A transportation company has $6$ buses with the following capacities: $30$, $40$, $50$, $30$, $40$, $60$. What is the $\median$ capacity?

The following data set represents the number of passengers on $10$ buses: $20$, $25$, $30$, $20$, $25$, $30$, $35$, $20$, $25$, $30$. Which measure of central tendency is most appropriate for this data set?

The average delivery time for $8$ packages is $4$ hours. If $2$ more packages with delivery times $3$ and $5$ hours are added, calculate the new average delivery time and compare it with the original average delivery time. Show all your work and explain your reasoning.

A logistics company has two branches with the following delivery times (in hours) for $5$ packages: Branch A: $2$, $3$, $4$, $5$, $6$ and Branch B: $1$, $2$, $3$, $4$, $7$. Calculate and compare the $\mean$, $\median$, and $\mode$ for the two branches. Show all your work and explain your reasoning.

teacher_rules: Tip 1: Review the concept of central tendency and the differences between mean, median, and mode.
Tip 2: Make sure to read the questions carefully and choose the correct answer based on the context.
Tip 3: For free response questions, show all work and explain reasoning to receive full credit.
